heading: Officers and employees
label: 90104 Officers and employees
notes: Amendments2014— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 113–237section 152604 of this title
amendments: Amendments2014— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 113–237section 152604 of this title

children.heading: .—Appointment of Officers and Employees
children.label: a .—Appointment of Officers and Employees
children.text: The board of directors appoints, removes, and replaces officers and employees of the foundation.

children.heading: Status and Compensation of Employees.—
children.label: b Status and Compensation of Employees.—
A
children.text: are not employees of the Federal Government (except as may otherwise be provided in this chapter);

children.label: B
children.text: shall be appointed and removed without regard to the provisions of title 5 governing appointments in the competitive service; and

children.label: C
children.text: may be paid without regard to chapter 51 and subchapter III of chapter 53 of title 5.

children.heading: .—Availability of federal employee rates for travel
children.label: 2 .—Availability of federal employee rates for travel
children.text: For purposes of any schedules of rates negotiated by the Administrator of General Services for the use of employees of the Federal Government who travel on official business, officers and employees of the foundation who travel while engaged in the performance of their duties under this chapter shall be deemed to be employees of the Federal Government.
